title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Kaido, Unknown person #4, Roger as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: "AU son de la contre- Yattaque!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Here he is, what a surprise....!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A bit too careful, wouldn't you be? How did you know?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I was on my way to this deserted land, in order to cut your drunk head off

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I did not plan an intense fight

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There might well be a spy inside your palace, Worororo

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't want to transform my new home into a battlefield...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: So I came your way, that's all

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It was all a lie, eh?

dialogue.speaker: Kaido
dialogue.text: Kaido!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That's right..... Wororo. It was all a lie.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that time we were at a disadvantage.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you teamed up with HYogoro upon your return....

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You could have made the Samurai and gangsters around Wano Country gather as our enemies.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We were still short on men... It would've turned into an excruciating battle for us.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: At that time, if you stayed true to your name

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: of a dangerous psycho who was not afraid of casualties, what would have happened... Worororo!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But you chose the way that did not harm anybody...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're really like the type of pirate whitebeard and Roger were, a powerful type but with a certain softness...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You are the same!! The fool who dances and dances!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: naked, mocked and despised.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: WORORO!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You have nothing left, not even your family name's authority!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I don't regret the choice that made that day.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Let's talk about the imminent future, instead.

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 25 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
